description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named wasm that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest. For each OS, check out the code, set up Python 3.11, install UV, compile fastled.js, fastled.wasm, and index.html, scan for wasm/js/html artifacts, check for required artifacts, generate a timestamp and random hex, upload wasm artifacts, install Playwright, and verify FastLED_onFrame.
